title: ice-server
summary: Link relation type "ice-server": Conveys the STUN and TURN servers that can be used by an ICE agent to establish a connection with a peer. Defined in RFC9725.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: Conveys the STUN and TURN servers that can be used by an ICE agent to establish a connection with a peer.
